creator: marius@alchemy.franken.de
text:
On Wed, Nov 17, 2010 at 08:19:53AM -0600, Tom Judge wrote:
> Hi Marius,
> 
> Would it not be possible to have the release system set an environment
> variable that the port would look for in order to sanitize its environment.
> 
> Say hide all the MAKE_ENV stuff behind in .if defined(RELEASE_BUILDING)?
> 

Well, then the next one comes around and wants to build a release with
a proxy set in the environment. Putting more and more hacks into the port
just moves the problem around or trades one problem for another. What
really needs to be fixed are the release building scripts but so far I've
no good idea how to do that. I'll probably need to ask ru@ about it.

Marius
